context.summary: Use two BBC micro:bits to measure sound levels in a science investigation into the sound insulation properties of different materials.

code.source:
from microbit import *
import radio


radio.config(group=1)
radio.on()

while True:
    # turn the sound level into a string so we can send it over radio
    radio.send(str(microphone.sound_level()))
    sleep(200)
